s1.ptxt: With ignition “OFF”, disconnect CMP sensor connector.
Using service wire, connect CMP sensor and CMP sensor connector.
Set ignition “ON”, check that output voltage varies depending on position of signal rotor as follows.

item.ptxt: CMP sensor is opposite to projection of signal rotor: approx. 0 V
CMP sensor is away to projection of signal rotor: approx. 5 V
